*** 4 FATAL, 2 INJ *** STATE HIGHWAY 130 WASHED OUT AT MILE MARKER 55.5 WHERE BRUSH CREEK CROSSES HIGHWAY. A VEHICLE CARRYING 5 OCCUPANTS DROVE INTO THIS WASHOUT EARLY TUESDAY MORNING AND WERE WASHED DOWNSTREAM. 4 FATALITIES OCCURRED IN THE ACCIDENT. SHORTLY AFTERWARD...ANOTHER VEHICLE DROVE INTO THE WASH OUT. DRIVER WAS RESCUED.
